news.t: Last Week's Top 5 Articles Highlight Areas of Interest, Concern
T. Rowe Price Value ETF Earns Morningstar Recognition

holdings.infoBox: TEQI is an equity ETF with a total of 125 individual holdings. The top holdings are NXP Semiconductors stock at 2.82%, Alphabet at 2.14%, The Southern Company at 2.06%, MetLife at 2.04%, and TotalEnergies SE at 2.04%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Equity Income ETF (TEQI) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 404.54m in AUM and 124 holdings. TEQI is an actively-managed, non-transparent fund of global large-cap companies that are positioned to outperform the Russell 1000 Value Index TEQI was launched on Aug 4, 2020 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: T. Rowe Price Value ETF Earns Morningstar Recognition
data.text: The T. Rowe Price Equity Income ETF (TEQI) has earned a spot on Morningstar's list of the best active value stock ETFs to buy in 2026, joining 17 other actively managed value ETF strategies recognized...
